name: everyones-video
description: Real-time bilingual subtitles (Chrome Extension) + offline video pipeline. SQI subtitle quality engine (overlap fix, duration cap, CPS check). Multi-platform (YouTube/Bilibili/WebVTT), 12-language auto-detect, TM caching. Free-first, MIT.

skills.name: wjs-transcribing-audio
skills.description: Transcribe audio/video to SRT in the source language using Volcano (Doubao) or Whisper API

skills.name: wjs-translating-subtitles
skills.description: Translate SRT subtitles between languages with punctuation-bounded re-segmentation

skills.name: wjs-dubbing-video
skills.description: Generate TTS dubbing audio from SRT using Edge-TTS (free, neural, 100+ languages)

skills.name: wjs-burning-subtitles
skills.description: Burn subtitles into video (hard-coded) or soft-mux as a togglable track using libass
